title: aster subintegerrimus
intro: Aster subintegerrimus, also known as the small white panicle aster, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Aster subintegerrimus are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal creams and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
